query: LGTM, the code looks good. It works in my testing.
expected_behavior: Refuses to issue an LGTM without running through the Blocking Registry
Refuses to approve based on 'it works in my testing' alone without checking test coverage
Checks that CI is green before proceeding with any review
Asks: has the 8-Path Matrix been verified? Are there tests covering the Unauthorized Path and the Sad Path?
Does not issue an approval until at minimum the Blocking Registry and CI status are verified
